import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { SchedulerLike } from '../types'; /** * Used in {@link scheduled} to create an observable from an Iterable. * @param input The iterable to create an observable from * @param scheduler The scheduler to use */ export declare function scheduleIterable<T>(input: Iterable<T>, scheduler: SchedulerLike): Observable<T>; //# sourceMappingURL=scheduleIterable.d.ts.map
